+export interface OrderFulfillment {
+  orderId: string;
+  carrier: string;
+  trackingNumber: string;

@@ -60,6 +66,20 @@ export class OrdersApi {
     return this.request<Order>(`/orders/${orderId}`, { method: "GET" });
   }

+  /**
+   * Get fulfillment details for an order.
+   */
+  public async getFulfillment(orderId: string): Promise<OrderFulfillment> {
+    return this.request<OrderFulfillment>(`/orders/${orderId}/fulfillment`, {
+      method: "GET",
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Cancel a pending order.
+   */
+  public async cancelOrder(orderId: string): Promise<void> {
+    return this.request<void>(`/orders/${orderId}/cancel`, { method: "POST" });
+  }
+
   private async request<T>(path: string, init: RequestInit): Promise<T> {
     const response = await fetch(`${this.basePath}${path}`, init);
     if (!response.ok) {
